name: Intrinsyc Software International, Inc.
description: Intrinsyc Software International, Inc. (now known as Intrinsyc Technologies Corporation, and subsequently acquired by Lantronix) is a product development company that provides hardware, software, and services for the development of embedded and Internet of Things (IoT) devices. The company specializes in system-on-module (SoM) solutions and engineering services, helping clients build advanced, connected products utilizing Qualcomm Snapdragon technologies.
